name: flux-kontext-max
description: A premium text-based image editing model that delivers maximum performance and improved typography generation for transforming images through natural language prompts

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image. Use 'match_input_image' to match the aspect ratio of the input image.
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

input_image.description: Image to use as reference. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
input_image.title: Input Image

output_format.description: Output format for the generated image
output_format.title: output_format

prompt.description: Text description of what you want to generate, or the instruction on how to edit the given image.
prompt.title: Prompt

safety_tolerance.description: Safety tolerance, 0 is most strict and 6 is most permissive. 2 is currently the maximum allowed when input images are used.
safety_tolerance.title: Safety Tolerance

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed
